ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataExpert-io/data-engineer-handbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataExpert-io/data-engineer-handbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
This is a repo with links to everything you'd ever want to learn about data engineering

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataTalksClub/data-engineering-zoomcamp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/data-engineering-zoomcamp
Language: jupyter-notebook
Data Engineering Zoomcamp is a free 9-week course on building production-ready data pipelines. The next cohort starts in January 2026. Join the course here 👇🏼

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GokuMohandas/Made-With-ML
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GokuMohandas/Made-With-ML
Language: jupyter-notebook
Learn how to develop, deploy and iterate on production-grade ML applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Liquid4All/cookbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Liquid4All/cookbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
Examples, end-2-end tutorials and apps built using Liquid AI Foundational Models (LFM) and the LEAP SDK

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NirDiamant/GenAI_Agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NirDiamant/GenAI_Agents
Language: jupyter-notebook
This repository provides tutorials and implementations for various Generative AI Agent techniques, from basic to advanced. It serves as a comprehensive guide for building intelligent, interactive AI systems.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SakanaAI/AI-Scientist
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SakanaAI/AI-Scientist
Language: jupyter-notebook
The AI Scientist: Towards Fully Automated Open-Ended Scientific Discovery 🧑‍🔬

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ageron/handson-mlp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ageron/handson-mlp
Language: jupyter-notebook
A series of Jupyter notebooks that walk you through the fundamentals of Machine Learning and Deep Learning in Python using Scikit-Learn, PyTorch, and Hugging Face libraries.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alirezadir/Machine-Learning-Interviews
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alirezadir/Machine-Learning-Interviews
Language: jupyter-notebook
This repo is meant to serve as a guide for Machine Learning/AI technical interviews.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chiphuyen/aie-book
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chiphuyen/aie-book
Language: jupyter-notebook
[WIP] Resources for AI engineers. Also contains supporting materials for the book AI Engineering (Chip Huyen, 2025)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: codebasics/py
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/codebasics/py
Language: jupyter-notebook
Repository to store sample python programs for python learning

ns0:entry.ns0:title: crewAIInc/crewAI-examples
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/crewAIInc/crewAI-examples
Language: jupyter-notebook
A collection of examples that show how to use CrewAI framework to automate workflows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ed-donner/llm_engineering
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ed-donner/llm_engineering
Language: jupyter-notebook
Repo to accompany my mastering LLM engineering course

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/ai-agents-for-beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/ai-agents-for-beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
12 Lessons to Get Started Building AI Agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pathwaycom/llm-app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pathwaycom/llm-app
Language: jupyter-notebook
Ready-to-run cloud templates for RAG, AI pipelines, and enterprise search with live data. 🐳Docker-friendly.⚡Always in sync with Sharepoint, Google Drive, S3, Kafka, PostgreSQL, real-time data APIs, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: salesforce/BLIP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/salesforce/BLIP
Language: jupyter-notebook
PyTorch code for BLIP: Bootstrapping Language-Image Pre-training for Unified Vision-Language Understanding and Generation

ns0:entry.ns0:title: warproxxx/poly_data
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/warproxxx/poly_data
Language: jupyter-notebook
Polymarket Data Retriever that fetches, processes, and structures Polymarket data including markets, order events and trades.
